title: Dylon Ultra Whitener, Whitens and Revives White Laundry, Removes Stains, for all Fabrics - Pack of 5 Sachets
features: Revives and brightens whites – The innovative laundry sheet not only catches dirt particles but also works against greying and revitalizes the brightness of whites – wash after wash.
Easy to use - Simple, quick and convenient to use, giving you the whitest whites every wash.
Even at low temperatures - Dylon Ultra Whitener can restore their brilliant whiteness even at low temperatures.
All Fabrics* - Dylon Whitener works on all fabrics
description: Product Description "When your whites are looking dull and discoloured, Dylon Ultra Whitener sachets can restore their brilliant whiteness even at low temperatures. Simple, quick and convenient to use, giving you the whitest whites every wash. The sachets' surface is: Made of 100% naturally - derived fibres, free from microplastic fibres. All fabrics* *Not suitable for wool and silk Laundry detergents alone cannot maintain that new brilliance everyone wants for their whites. " Ingredients 5-15% Oxygen-based Bleaching Agent Perfumes, Enzymes, Optical Brighteners Manufacturer Contact Information Henkel Ltd., Wood Lane End, Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, HP2 4RQ, United Kingdom.
